zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Corbet於大約1185年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾馬可斯東馬可斯東 豪斯時，她的父親Walter Corbet30歲，母親Alice De Valognes28歲。她和Duncan Macduff至少有1個兒子。她去世於1250年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Corbet was born about 1185, in Makerstoun House, Makerstoun, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Corbet, was 30 and her mother, Alice De Valognes, was 28. She had at least 1 son with Duncan Macduff. She died in 1250, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 66.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Corbet(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 마커스토우 마커스토우 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Corbet(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Valognes(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Duncan Macduff(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.
